author: Jan S.
message:
feat(gui): use ResourcePanel with file-type specific tabs. (PR #2915)

* feat(gui): use ResourcePanel with file-type specific tabs.

Resources can now be viewed in one ResourcePanel which shows one or more tabs based on the file-type. That way we can reuse existing tab types like code/text and hex views.

* fix(gui): Add missing io_error_dialog.close translation

* fix(gui): Hex tab: lazy loading of data block-by-block

* chore: fix code style

* fix(gui): Added missing io_error_dialog.close entries

format output as [node ref] | code line, deduplicate same nodes.

author: Vasiliy Mikhailov
message:
fix: ImmutableList.lastIndexOf skipping index 0 (PR #2898)

* Fix ImmutableList.lastIndexOf skipping index 0

The backward loop in lastIndexOf used i > 0 as its condition, so it never
examined index 0. An element present only at index 0 (including a
single-element list) returned -1 instead of 0.

Use i >= 0 so index 0 is checked.

* fix code style

---------

Co-authored-by: Skylot <118523+skylot@users.noreply.github.com>
